text:
amdmi3      2009-03-17 17:18:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt/nagios12    Makefile 
    net-mgmt/nrpe        Makefile 
  Log:
  - Mark as deprecated and schedule for removal in four weeks: last releases were back in 2004, neither of Nagios 1.x and NRPE 1.x are supported by the author.
  - Pass maintainership of nrpe to submitter (nagios12 maintainer)
  
  PR:             132716
  Submitted by:   Jarrod Sayers <jarrod at netleader dot com dot au> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.53      +3 -0      ports/net-mgmt/nagios12/Makefile
  1.20      +4 -1      ports/net-mgmt/nrpe/Makefile
